testcases.input: s = "11011000" Output: "11100100" Explanation: The strings "10" [occuring at s[1]] and "1100" [at s[3]] are swapped. This is the lexicographically largest string possible after some number of swaps.
testcases.expectedOutput: "11100100" Explanation: The strings "10" [occuring at s[1]] and "1100" [at s[3]] are swapped. This is the lexicographically largest string possible after some number of swaps.
